headline: Jim Cramer Calls EQT His “Favorite Oil and Gas Company”
summary: EQT Corporation (NYSE:EQT) was among Jim Cramer’s latest stock calls, as he advised investors on how to manage data center-related stock positions. Cramer showed quite a lot of enthusiasm for the company, as he commented: Earlier this week, we got results from my favorite oil and gas company, EQT, one of the largest natural gas […]

headline: Macquarie Nears $6 Billion Cleco Sale To Stonepeak, Bernhard
summary: Deal could be announced as soon as Monday, pending regulatory approvals and final terms.

headline: Eni's Gas Discoveries Power Its Push to Capture Rising LNG Demand
summary: E expands its LNG strategy with projects in Mozambique and Indonesia, including a 5 Tcf gas discovery in the Kutei Basin to boost global supply growth.

headline: Wondering what's happening in today's S&P500  pre-market session?
summary: As the US market prepares to open on Tuesday, let's get an early glimpse into the pre-market session and identify the S&P500 stocks leading the pack in terms of gains and losses.
